falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 8% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'hold' signal, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by showing clear breakout momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 3x the 30-day average on a single day with a price surge of +5%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a blowoff volume surge would confirm explosive buying pressure, directly contradicting the 'hold' signal and proving the pattern match invalid.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 50 and remains above 50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would demonstrate extreme momentum divergence from the 2022 pattern, falsifying the 81% similarity claim and invalidating the hold verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
